subject: A massive translucent green ooze in mid-slither across an open road, the silhouette of a consumed vehicle dimly visible inside its gelatinous mass; the ooze has a small toothy maw at its front leading edge and is leaving a slime trail behind it
description: A bright translucent green ooze churns forward across a pale dusty roadway, its body glistening and bubbled with internal sheen. The silhouette of an engulfed vehicle is faintly visible suspended inside the slime, the shape of a chassis still discernible mid-digestion. A small dark gaping maw with teeth sits at the front of the ooze like a mouth pulled forward by momentum. The background is hazy and warm-toned, with low distant shapes suggesting open desert or wasteland terrain under a bright sky. The composition emphasizes lateral motion, the ooze stretched horizontally as if surging in pursuit.
foreground: translucent green ooze in motion with consumed vehicle inside
background: hazy warm desert roadway with distant terrain
